narrativeLines.text: npm led with 83% of 4,797 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (17%).

narrativeLines.text: @ai-rpg-engine/modules with 441 downloads this week. Runner-up: sovereignty-game (321).

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.85 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: 4 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @world-forge/renderer-2d, @world-forge/export-ai-rpg, @world-forge/editor and 1 more show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 83% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 1 package predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @mcptoolshop/sovereignty.

recommendations.title: 26 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @ai-rpg-engine/starter-detective, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-cyberpunk, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-pirate. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 75 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: sovereignty-game, mcp-bouncer, backpropagate, tool-compass, mcpt scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 1 package in rapid decline
actionableAdvice.action: Check for competing packages, broken releases, or ecosystem changes. Push a patch release or announcement.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.85 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 83% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.

actionableAdvice.title: 4 packages with untapped potential
actionableAdvice.detail: @world-forge/renderer-2d, @world-forge/export-ai-rpg, @world-forge/editor have active users but stalled growth.
actionableAdvice.action: Add new features, improve docs, or create tutorials. Small efforts can shift these from D to C+ quickly.
